items.title: Breaking: We have a mole in the NYPD
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Breaking: We have a mole in the NYPD

As I and a few reporter friends walked up Eighth Avenue after the game, a squad car stopped in the street, briefly hit the siren, and then announced on the PA "SPURS IN SIX" and drove off.

items.title: 70 BLOCKS IN 20 POSTSEASON GAMES 👽
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
70 BLOCKS IN 20 POSTSEASON GAMES 👽

Victor Wembanyama has surpassed Dikembe Mutombo's 69 blocks during the 1994 postseason for the most blocks by a player in their first career playoff run since blocks were fully recorded.

items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:

"He might be the most mature player on our team and he's nowhere near the oldest. He's been in big games before the NBA."
